title: Building an AND Gate Circuit
description: Learn to place logic gates, add inputs and outputs, and wire them together.

steps.instruction: Place an AND gate on the canvas
steps.hint: Click the Gates tab in the left panel, then drag the AND gate onto the canvas.

steps.instruction: Add two InputSwitch elements to the canvas
steps.hint: Click the I/O tab in the left panel, then drag two InputSwitch elements onto the canvas and place them to the left of the AND gate.

steps.instruction: Connect both input switches to the AND gate
steps.hint: Click and drag from an InputSwitch output port (right side) to one of the AND gate input ports (left side). Repeat for the second switch.

steps.instruction: Add an LED and connect it to the AND gate output
steps.hint: Drag an LED from the I/O tab and place it to the right of the AND gate. Then connect the AND gate output port (right side) to the LED input port (left side).

steps.instruction: Toggle the switches and observe the LED — this is AND logic!
steps.hint: Click an InputSwitch to toggle it. The LED only lights up when BOTH switches are ON. That is because AND outputs 1 only when all inputs are 1.
